title: YTUHD
description: Unlocks 1440p and 2160p resolutions (VP9-compatible) in iOS YouTube app.

details: Removed unused code (contributed by @Tonwalter888)
Updated spoof version to 15.8.6 (for iOS 14-)
Removed VP9-specific settings on YouTube version 20.47.3 and higher (software VP9 decoding is no longer supported here)
Renamed the setting "Use VP9" to "Use VP9/AV1"

changes.details: Prevented app crash in some very rare scenarios
Improved the technique to enable 2K/4K formats with Server ABR enabled
Moved YTUHD settings to a dedicated page (requires YouGroupSettings tweak version 1.0.5+ if you have it installed previously)
Added "Disable Server ABR" option to fix old YouTube versions (around 17.x.x) not being able to play a video when the tweak is enabled
Fixed tweak not working on recent YouTube versions

details: Fixed 2K/4K formats not showing on recent YouTube versions
Updated spoof version to 15.8.5 (for iOS 14-)
Updated zh-cn localization
Made 2K/4K formats available on server ABR
Disabled client ABR forcing code
Added libundirect as a dependency
Removed video auto-reload workaround
Fixed the video buffering issueHopefully fixed the random audio track switching issue
Note: This version may be sideloading incompatible

changes.details: Fixed a possible app crash when viewing broken Shorts (regression of 1.6.5)
Added the workaround to auto-reload a video when it is stuck at buffering state for more than 2 seconds
Ensure software AV1 decoding is functional (untested)
Improved the stability of video playback when Use VP9 option is enabled
Fixed incorrect video formats filtering logic (for ex. 1080p VP9 format is not removed even when All VP9 option is disabled)

details: Updated spoof version to 15.8.4 (for iOS 14-)
Updated pl localization

changes.details: Added some libvpx settings that you can configure for VP9 decoding behavior, mainly setting the number of decoding threads

details: "Use VP9" setting is no longer enabled by default
Removed the hooks to fall back to use the old ABR policy
In settings, corrected the minimum hardware VP9 device requirement from A11 to A12
Removed message about UHD resolutions not working with YouPiP from settings (v1.5.8 made it work)

changes.details: Added 2K/4K formats to AVPlayer video playback (YouPiP with Legacy PiP option enabled)

details: Translated the remaining languages using AI
Removed redundant hook

changes.details: Maybe Fixed an issue where a video may start with a random non-preferred caption track
Added id, pl localization

details: Added a future-proof hook for when iosPlayerClientSharedConfigPostponeCabrPreferredFormatFiltering will be removed
Updated spoof version to 15.8.3 (for iOS 14-)
Updated ru, tr localization

changes.details: Fixed 1440p+ formats not showing on YouTube version 19.24.2 and higher
Fixed crash on YouTube version 19.22.3 and higher

details: Fixed 1440p+ formats not showing on recent YouTube versions
Force enabled AV1 codec alongside VP9
Updated ja localization
Force VP9 formats only for 1440p and higher
Added "VP9 for all" option where you can enable VP9 for all resolutions
Fixed crash on YouTube version 19.03.2 and higher
Updated spoof version to 15.8.1 (for iOS 14-)
Hooks MLABRPolicyNew and MLABRPolicyOld classes (introduced in YouTube version 17.30.3)
Fixed crashing on some older YouTube versions
Forces enabling Video quality settings on older YouTube to have YTUHD setting there
Added th localization
Updated es, zh_cn localization

title: YouPiP
description:
Enables native PiP in iOS YouTube app.

YouPiP best supports the latest version of YouTube. You may downgrade to as far as version 16.29.4, older versions will not be (fully) supported.

changes.details: Fixed PiP being stuck on some devices (contributed by @Tonwalter888)
Adjusted setting icon to match the new icon style in recent YouTube versions

details: Fixed PiP not working on some videos in recent YouTube versions
Removed legacy code

changes.details: PiP should no longer activate if either "Use PiP Button" or "Use Video Tab Bar Button" is enabled
PiP should no longer activate if the YouTube's own PiP setting is off

details: Fixed PiP not working on iOS 13
Removed Legacy PiP option from iOS 13, because it must be enabled regardless
Known issue (iOS 13): PiP may not activate if it is not activated from the PiP button
Depends on ForceInPicture 1.0.1+ for iPhones running iOS 13 and lower
Fixed appWillEnterBackground: method not being called on iOS 14

changes.details: Added missing hooks for Legacy PiP for recent YouTube versions
Background playback is no longer forcibly enabled for YouPiP, you should ensure it is enabled in the original YouTube app settings

details: Simplified PiP enabling logic
Fixed setting icon not appearing when the tweak is disabled and grouped settings experiment is on
Fixed setting icon and Video Tab Bar PiP button being black in dark mode on YouTube version 20.02.3
When iOS Text Size is not default, the Video Tab Bar PiP button will be resized accordingly

changes.details: Added a new setting to make it possible for PiP to activate from either the video overlay button, the video tab bar button or dismissing the app at the same time
Possibly Fixed the tweak not working when PiP setting has never been on before
Updated for YTVideoOverlay 2.0.0

details: Added YTVideoOverlay as a dependency, allowing you to make PiP button appear either top or bottom of the video overlay
Made the tweak enabled by default
Added th localization
Removed legacy code and files, minimum supported YouTube version is now 16.29.4
Added YouGroupSettings tweak as an optional dependency
Fixed the logic for adding PiP button to the video tab bar (contributed by NguyenASang)
Fixed crash on YouTube version 19.24.2 and higher
Fixed a possible crash on old YouTube versions when opening settings
Corrected Legacy PiP availability logic
Corrected detection of Module_Framework.framework
Optimized the logic to add PiP button to the video tab bar
Added a localized version of tweak name for Polish
Added id, pl localization

title: YouMusicPiP
description: Enables native PiP in iOS YouTube Music app. This works for videos present in the app.

changes.details: Fixed support for modern app versions

title: YTClassicVideoQuality
description: Reverts to the original video quality selector in YouTube app.

title: YTSystemAppearance
description: Enables setting appearance (Light/Dark) based on system in YouTube app. Because this feature is based on iOS dark mode, the tweak only supports iOS/iPadOS 13 and above. YouTube version 15.10.4 and higher are officially supported. Older (but not too old) versions may.

title: YTReExplore
description:
Removes Shorts tab and replace with Explore tab in YouTube app.

This tweak is mostly for iPhones and iPods where Explore is replaced with Shorts.

Limitation: The text "Explore" is hardcoded in English because its localization is entirely from server-side.

title: YTShortsProgress
description: Always enables progress bar and scrubbing in YouTube Shorts.

details: Added more hooks (contributed by @dayanch96)
Fixed a bug where swiping on a full-screen video always triggers progress bar change

title: YouAreThere
description: Disables "Video paused. Continue watching?" popup in YouTube app when you play a long video.

title: NoYTPremium
description: Removes YouTube Premium upsells.

changes.details: Added more hooks for recent YouTube versions

title: NoYTMPremium
description: Removes YouTube Music Premium upsell elements (banner, alerts, tab item).

changes.details: Added more hooks for recent YouTube Music versions (contributed by @Tonwalter888)

title: YouRememberCaption
description:
This tweak does nothing on YouTube 20.16.7 and higher.
Makes YouTube remember your video caption setting, if not already.

title: YTNoCheckLocalNetwork
description: Removes Local Network permission check in YouTube app.

title: YTNoPaidPromo
description: Removes "Include paid promotion" banner from videos on YouTube app. What is paid promotion?

title: YTABConfig
description: YouTube usually implements a feature as an experiment. You may get to see it while others don't, and vice-versa. This tweak adds a new section named "A/B" in the app settings where all features can be toggled freely by you. There are thousands of features available. Some of them are already overridden by tweaks like YTABGoodies and its predecessors.

changes.details: Added pl localization
Fixed a rare app crash on startup

details: Added "Remove removed settings" inside the modified settings page to remove settings that are no longer available in the app
Added "(Removed)" suffix to settings under the modified settings page that are no longer available in the app
Improved performance throughout the tweak
Made "View modified settings" option navigate to a new page where flags can be toggled instead of just showing an alert

changes.details: Safely accesses YouTube configs
Removed kidsClient* and musicOfflineClient* A/B flags as they are unrelated to YouTube app

details: Translated the remaining languages using AI
Added th localization

changes.details: Made tweak settings displayed without YouGroupSettings tweak
Added YouGroupSettings tweak as a dependency

details: Updated setting icon
Added id localization
Reduced hooks used for constructing tweak settings
Updated vi localization
Fixed crash when copying settings on YouTube version 19.13.1 and higher
Updated tr localization
Fixed killswitch and grouped settings toggles not respecting the user's cancel action
Refactored the code
Updated es, ro and vi localization
Changed the format of exported current settings to be prefixed with YT(Cold|Hot|Global)Config.
The imported settings that have the same value as the current one will not be imported

changes.details: You can now import the YTABConfig settings from the clipboard

title: YTABConfigReset
description: Resets all A/B flags in YTABConfig tweak on YouTube app launch. This is useful when changing some A/B flags may cause the app to crash outright and there is no simple way to recover it. Once installed and you launched the YouTube app, all A/B flags will be reset. You will then uninstall YTABConfigReset tweak. Otherwise, A/B flags will keep being reset every time you launch the app.

title: YTMABConfig
description: YouTube Music usually implements a feature as an experiment. You may get to see it while others don't, and vice-versa. This tweak adds a new section named "A/B" in the app settings where all features can be toggled freely by you.

changes.details: Improved performance throughout the tweak

details: Removed "shorts" settings because they are irrelevant for YouTube Music
Added id, th localization

changes.details: Removed debug code
Fixed crash when copying settings

title: YTABGoodies
description: YouTube usually implements a feature as an experiment. You may get to see it while others don't, and vice-versa. This tweak enables or disables those features in a way useful to you. This replaces the following tweaks:

title: YTAutoFullScreen
description: Makes your video full-screen on playing.

details: Added support for YouTube version 19.42.1
Fixed possible crash in some cases (contributed by @bakedpotato191)

title: YTSilentVote
description: Removes popup when you like/dislike videos; those saying you liked the video and feedback shared with the creator.

title: YTVideoOverlay
description: A helper tweak to add buttons on YouTube's video overlay.

changes.details: Corrected frosted glass border radius
Improved management of frosted glass effect views
Extended "Update icon image on visible" behavior to top buttons
Fixed app crash on some YouTube versions (regression of 2.3.0)
Added an option to enable frosted glass effect behind the bottom buttons, supported by recent YouTube versions
Fixed overflowing text button on old YouTube versions
Fixed bottom buttons being too far apart from each other on YouTube version 20.12.4
Fixed incorrect button position in full-screen mode on recent YouTube versions
Added support for extra boolean settings from the tweak side

details: Fixed button order not visually changing in the settings
Translated the remaining languages using AI

changes.details: Ensure text overlay buttons are sized to be visible

details: Added an ability to reorder the buttons
Removed unnecessary YouQuality-specific code
Simplified the code needed to add buttons to the video overlay from the tweak side
Improved memory management
Added +[YTSettingsSectionItemManager setTweak:hasOwnToggle:] method, for tweaks that have their own toggle
Added tweak name above each button settings
Added th localization
Updated pl localization

changes.details: Added default text style for text button
Added a localized version of tweak name for Polish
Made tweak settings displayed without YouGroupSettings tweak
Added YouGroupSettings tweak as a dependency

details: Added support for text button
Updated setting icon
Fixed the bottom buttons not showing on YouTube version 16.45.4 and lower
Fixed the bottom buttons not showing for some users
Fixed crash on YouTube version 19.03.2 and higher
Fixed bottom buttons not positioned correctly on small iPhone devices
Fixed overlay buttons not appearing on YouTube version 19.02.1 and higher
Fixed incorrect button positioning in some scenarios
Added de, id localization

Increased the spacing between bottom buttons for better accessibility

title: YouMute
description: Adds a mute button to the video overlay where you can directly mute or unmute the video.

changes.details: Made mute setting persists between videos (contributed by @Tonwalter888, refined by owner)
Fixed mute button icon not updated correctly when it is placed at the top and the user muted the video before playing the next one
Optimized the code to display mute/unmute image
Added th localization

details: Updated for YTVideoOverlay 2.0.0
If the video is muted then the user closes the video, the mute icon will update correctly when the user opens the video again
Depends on YTVideoOverlay helper tweak
Added setting page, allowing you to toggle tweak and change mute button position
Fixed app crash on YouTube version 19.26.5 and higher
Corrected mute button position when placed at the bottom and the audio track button is visible
Added de, id, tr localization
Added a localized version of tweak name for Polish

title: YouQuality
description:
Adds a video quality to the video overlay where you can easily change the video quality.

Install YTClassicVideoQuality alongside this tweak to make video quality list appear right away.

changes.details: Removed unused code
Depends on YTVideoOverlay 2.1.1+
Added th localization
Fixed 720p and lower quality text entering a new line when the button is placed at the top
Depends on YTVideoOverlay 2.1.0+
Removed unused code
Updated for YTVideoOverlay 2.0.0

details: [Technical] On memory deallocation, only unregister its own observer
Added ar, de, ja, pl, ru, tr, zh_cn localization
Fixed quality label arrangement when the current video format has HDR
Make label displays for non 60 FPS 720p, 1080p, 2K and 4K
Depends on YTVideoOverlay helper tweak

title: YouSpeed
description: Adds a speed button to the video overlay where you can directly change the video speed. Also add more video speeds to choose from.

changes.details: Fixed the video speed overlay button not updating after changing the speed via YouTube's own speed selector
Made "Playback speed slider" setting works when "More speeds" setting is not enabled (contributed by @Tonwalter888)
Fixed custom video speeds not working for some people
Fixed custom video speeds not showing on recent YouTube versions (contributed by @Tonwalter888)
Fixed the icon of minus button not being displayed on old YouTube versions

details: Fixed tapping on speed presets not dismissing the dialog
Fixed speed presets not being aligned correctly in RTL languages
Added speed presets to the speed slider dialog
Removed the now redundant hook
Improved the style of plus and minus buttons in the speed slider dialog
Fixed plus and minus buttons not having background color in light mode
Added increase and decrease speed buttons to the speed slider dialog
Tweaked the speed slider dialog UI

changes.details: Fixed the current speed slider value not updating correctly
Added the ability to replace the primitive video speed selector with a slider, for more precise speed selection
Added the ability to replace the default video speed selector with the primitive one, where custom speeds can be added
Fixed video speed button not updating when changing the video speed on old YouTube versions
Added more video speeds to choose from, configured from YTVideoOverlay settings

details: Removed unused code
Fixed vi localization not working
Added th localization

changes.details: Updated for YTVideoOverlay 2.0.0

details: Added vi localizationInitial release

title: YouTube X
description: No ads and background playback.

changes.details: Blocked new kind of video ads on recent YouTube versions
Experimental: Removed the probably unnecessary hooks related to ads
Restored update dialog blocker
Removed version spoofing code (moved to YouTube Legacy tweak)
Disabled the new jailbreak detection in new YouTube versions
Spoofed YouTube version to 19.14.2 for clients with version 17.09.1 and lower to make app functional
Made YouTube version 17.x.x/18.x.x functional again
Fixed video comments section not loading on old YouTube versions
Blocked in-video product ads overlay and engagement panel
Fixed shorts ads blocking
Added background playback setting (under Offline)
Properly blocked shopping_item_card_list ads
Improved shorts ads blocking logic
Blocked shopping_carousel ads
Re-blocked search ads

Implemented efficient feed ads blocking logic

title: YouChooseQuality
description: Auto-selects the video quality of choice in iOS YouTube app.

changes.details: Fixed possible crash when playing a video
Fixed quality choosing not working on Shorts
Fixed incorrect resolution choosing in some videos
Shortened each scenario label in settings so that devices of a small form factor can see the full text
Moved the tweak description in the settings to under "Enabled" option so that the text is not cut off
Added th localization
Fixed incorrect resolution choosing when a video is vertical
Made tweak settings displayed without YouGroupSettings tweak
Added YouGroupSettings tweak as a dependency

title: YouSlider
description: Customizes YouTube video slider and scrubber color. You can also replace the scrubber with your own image.

changes.details: Fixed setting scrubber color not working on old YouTube versions (regression of 1.3.2)
Fixed app crash on recent YouTube versions

details: Fixed setting scrubber color not working on recent YouTube versions
Added localization for many languages

changes.details: Added slider and scrubber color customization for live videos

details: Added a new setting to animate slider and scrubber progress

changes.details: Fixed setting slider color not working in Subscription and You tabs

details: Fixed scrubber sizing logic in regular videos

title: YouTube Legacy
description:
Makes old YouTube versions functional and not crash as the time goes by. It is confirmed to work on YouTube 16.32.6+.

You only need this tweak if you are on iOS 15 or lower, or you are using YouTube app version 20.23.3 or lower.

Ensure that you have https://repo.chariz.com repository added to your package manager.

details: Added a workaround to make texts white on dark mode on old YouTube versions
Fixed missing tab icons on old YouTube versions
Updated spoofed iOS version to 15.8.7 (for iOS 14-)
Added th localization

changes.details: Fixed video previous/next buttons and autoplay not working on YouTube version 19
Experimental: Updated spoofed app version to 20.21.6 and Added few fixes after the fact
Added support for iOS 15 a.k.a YouTube version 20.23.3 and lower
Downgraded YouTube element metadata to version 19.14.2 to improve overall compatibility

details: Fixed app crash when opening History panel in You tab on old YouTube versions
Fixed tapping on Shorts channel name not opening the channel page on old YouTube versions
Fixed swipe to remove button not showing in History page
Fixed app crash when playing Shorts on some devices
Fixed tapping on History or Playlist panel in You tab playing the first video instead of expanding the panel
Fixed app crash or video not playing for videos in You tab (YouTube premium users)
Made opening History or Playlist panel in You tab transition to a new page to prevent navigation issues
Made all videos in channel page play on tapping
Made Shorts not activated as a separate view controller on old YouTube versions
Made Shorts share button open iOS native share sheet instead (from 1.7.0)
Fixed Shorts title and channel name not showing on old YouTube versions
Fixed tapping on video cards in History and Playlists pages not playing the video on old YouTube versions
Made Shorts view comments button open Shorts URL on old YouTube versions
Added missing view comments and share buttons to Shorts (view comments button works on YouTube version 17.10.2 and higher)
Updated spoofed iOS version to 15.8.5 (for iOS 14-)
Spoofed iOS version to 15.8.4 (for iOS 14-) to make account sign-in works
Blocked another kind of YouTube upgrade dialog
Fixed going to the previous or next video in the second or more video of the playlist not working
Fixed the app hang on launch due to YouTube Playables (by removing them)
Fixed tapping on Audio Track video menu not working
Fixed missing icon for "Purchases and membership" menu in You tab
Added missing update dialog blocker (was in YouTube X tweak before)
Added an alert on app startup if the user has modified Info.plist file to spoof the YouTube version, as this is discouraged while using this tweak
Added a one-time alert to inform users that, to play a video, they may need to tap on the triple dot menu and select "Play"
Removed YouTube X as a dependency, Ported its version spoofing code to this tweak
Improved UI element compatibility by backporting the latest YouTube element metadata (20.18.4 at the time of writing, this works for the late versions of YouTube 17.x.x and above)
Restored like/dislike buttons in Shorts
Restored refreshed Watch Later playlist on iPad
Required YouTube X 1.7.13+ to make video cards appear properly on YouTube version 17.09.1 and lower
Added the check to not apply this tweak on YouTube version 19.01.1 and higher
Fixed app crash when tapping on a video card on old YouTube versions
Fixed video previous/next buttons and autoplay not working on old YouTube versions
Fixed play video overlay button not working on old YouTube versions
Fixed app crash when revealing the video menu on old YouTube versions
Fixed "Select another account" menu not showing on old YouTube versions
Fixed Play option on videos under scrollable lists playing an entirely different video
Fixed the left side of the video player (with live chat) not responding to double tap to seek gesture on iPads
Fixed missing icon for some video menus
Fixed You tab image not showing on YouTube version 17.09.1 and lower
Fixed You tab not showing the default icon in signed-out state
Fixed tapping on a video in Home not playing on iPhones
Fixed Play option not showing for videos in Home tab and the search results on iPhones
Fixed tapping on a video in Home and Subscription tabs not playing
Added Return YouTube Dislike tweak as a dependency
Added "Select another account" menu to the account overflow menu, making it possible to switch accounts
Removed NoYTPremium tweak as a dependency and included some of its code inside this tweak to work around uYou tweak's strict outdated requirements
Fixed Play option playing a different video if the video is in a grid
Fixed Play option not showing for videos in the search results, history, user's playlists and channel playlists
Fixed "Your movies" icon in Subscriptions tab not rendering correctly
Fixed missing number in like/dislike buttons under the video (RYD tweak must be enabled)
Fixed video like/dislike numbers being dark in dark mode
Fixed the account image not showing in the bottom bar
Added Play option to the video and playlist menu (to work around video not playing when you tap on the video, only for videos that tapping does nothing)
Fixed tapping on a video not playing gracefully
Added NoYTPremium tweak as a dependency as it actually blocks a variant of the update dialog
Added YouSpeed and YTClassicVideoQuality tweaks as dependencies to work around broken video speed and quality selectors

title: YouGetCaption
description: Views and copies captions directly from YouTube videos.

changes.details: Fixed missing translations
